query_normalized: collectionlora: collecting 50 effects in 1 lora via multi-teacher on-policy distillation computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) as it measures the same core mechanism (on-policy distillation in language models) that the user's question investigates, even though it uses self-distillation rather than multi-teacher distillation and doesn't address LoRA specifically. It also satisfies (b) by operating in the same domain of language model policy optimization and distillation, making it relevant prior work for a literature review on on-policy distillation methods.
